Captured by intercepting the Set a goal flyout save request after setting
a 10-day / 8% sample target. The request was aborted before persistence, so
no goal was created in the tenant.

Returns retention and inactivity settings used by Setup and inventory onboarding.

Captured by intercepting the Setup page retention-slider save request.
The UI emitted a POST to the collection URL with the current `settingsId`
and the selected retention value. The intercepted slider moved from `30`
to `35`, revealing the UI's 5-day increment behavior.

response.name: Settings updated with no response body
Settings payload is invalid or outside the retention bounds

description.content:
Bundle-generated inventory client also exposes a PATCH-by-id delta
endpoint for the same settings entity. The current Setup page save flow
used the collection POST above instead.

response.name: Settings patch payload is invalid or outside the retention bounds

description.content:
The M365 Apps Inventory API is used by the Microsoft 365 Apps admin center
to query device inventory, build summaries, add-ins, setup state, and
security update currency from `query.inventory.insights.office.net`.

This surface was observed while browsing:

  - Home and Cloud Update
  - Inventory
  - Security Update Status
  - Setup

Requests use portal-issued bearer tokens together with diagnostic headers such
as `x-api-name`, `x-correlationid`, `x-manageoffice-client-sid`, and
`x-requested-with`. Most observed requests specify `api-version=1.1` and
accept OData-style query options.

A second pass with token-backed probes confirmed additional inventory
families including Languages, OfficeApplications, OfficeAddinVersions,
Onboarding, `GetLatestSecurityReleasesPerServicingChannel`, and the
`SecurityVulnerabilities` endpoints. Intercepted save flows also exposed the
request bodies used by Setup (`POST /inventory/api/Settings`) and Security
Update Status (`POST /inventory/api/SecurityCurrencyGoal`).

Export paths and the configured but still-unlit host
`health.insights.office.net` remain bundle discoveries that were not
exercised in the current tenant.

Documentation and specifications have been provided on a best-efforts basis and
may not be 100% accurate.
